status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched. Note: cert-in.org.in has been flagged _broken/geo-restricted elsewhere in this registry's disclosure entry — the same access caveat likely applies to this URL.
notes: Operates under MeitY. See also registry/entity/in/org/cert-in.json and registry/disclosure/in/org/cert-in.json for CERT-In's CNA/vulnerability-reporting role.

match_nodes.description: CERT-In Directions on cybersecurity incident reporting (2022)

data.official_name: Directions under sub-section (6) of Section 70B of the Information Technology Act, 2000 relating to information security practices, procedure, prevention, response and reporting of cyber incidents for Safe & Trusted Internet
data.description: Issued April 28, 2022 under IT Act Section 70B, effective June 27, 2022 (MSME extension to September 25, 2022). Mandates 6-hour cyber-incident reporting to CERT-In, 180-day ICT log retention, and applies to service providers, intermediaries, data centres, VPN/VPS/cloud providers, and government bodies.
